fields.title: Detach mode-agent prompt presets from worker tool and sandbox defaults
fields.description: Deep/smart/rush subagents should inherit only the prompt-mode prompt and model selection. They should not inherit prompt-mode tool allowlist or full-access sandbox defaults. Default worker behavior should exclude memory and use a worker-safe sandbox preset (workspace-write or read-only), while remaining configurable from settings.json.
fields.notes: Planning summary: split mode-agent behavior into prompt/model inheritance from promptModes and separate worker-default capabilities; remove memory from mode-agent defaults; add settings.json overrides for mode-agent tools/sandbox defaults without reusing promptModes overrides; clamp worker sandbox against parent as today but default requested preset to detached worker preset (workspace-write, optionally read-only); cover with registry, sandbox-policy, and end-to-end agent allowlist tests; document new settings namespace and migration behavior.
